task:
In Google Chrome, load https://httpbin.org/forms/post and submit the order form with these exact values:
- Customer name: `John Smith`
- Telephone: `555-1234`
- E-mail: `john@example.com`
- Pizza Size: `medium`
- Comments: `Extra cheese please`

After submission, the page must show the submitted data echoed back.

verification.description: Submitted page contains customer name 'John Smith'
